oracle.title: Oracle
oracle.subtitle: Answers only from data already saved in the app — no AI, no connection needed. If it doesn't have it, it says so.
oracle.placeholder: Where do I get TM Toxic?
oracle.noMatch: I couldn't find an answer for that. I can help with: wild Pokémon/item locations, TMs/HMs/tutors, a Pokémon's type and stats, what a move or ability does, which Pokémon have a given ability, and type weaknesses/resistances.
oracle.example1: Where do I get TM Toxic?
oracle.example3: What does the ability Levitate do?

answers.notWildFromEvolution: %{name} doesn't appear in the wild — you get it by evolving %{from}.
answers.notWildUnknown: %{name} doesn't appear in the wild in the data collected so far (could be an evolution, fossil, boss, purchase, or event Pokémon).
answers.noAbilityHolders: No Pokémon in the data has the ability %{ability} across the 5 regions.
answers.noWeaknessesOrResistances: No special weaknesses or resistances — takes normal (x1) damage from every type.
answers.canAskMore: You can ask me about its location, stats, or weaknesses.
answers.statsLine:
%{name} — Type: %{types}
HP %{hp} · Attack %{attack} · Defense %{defense} · Sp. Atk %{spAttack} · Sp. Def %{spDefense} · Speed %{speed}

home.title: PokeMMO Companion
home.tournamentsCardSubtitle: Brackets and results for your group
home.pokedexCardSubtitle: Look up all 649 Pokémon across PokeMMO's 5 regions
home.guideCardSubtitle: Items, TMs and strategy, region by region
home.breedingCardSubtitle: IV and nature inheritance — PokeMMO's own system
home.shinyTrackerCardSubtitle: Manual encounter counter while you hunt
home.damageCardSubtitle: Real Gen 5 formula — the one PokeMMO uses
home.evTrainingCardSubtitle: EV counter for your live training sessions
home.backupCardSubtitle: Export or restore all your data via a code
home.boxCardSubtitle: Save builds for your real Pokémon and reuse them across the app

damage.title: Damage calculator
damage.subtitle: Gen 5 damage formula (the same one PokeMMO's battle engine uses). Doesn't include weather, multi-hit moves, doubles spread reduction, or item/ability-specific modifiers — use "other multiplier" if you know one applies.
damage.moveEmpty: No damaging moves available for this Pokémon.
damage.incomplete: Pick an attacking Pokémon, a damaging move, and a defending Pokémon to calculate.

shinies.title: Shiny tracker
shinies.subtitle: Manual encounter counter — it doesn't detect anything automatically, you tap +1 yourself each time the Pokémon you're hunting shows up.
shinies.empty: You don't have any hunts yet. Add one above.
shinies.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this hunt? Its counter will be lost.

breeding.title: Breeding calculator
breeding.subtitle: PokeMMO's breeding system differs from the official games: no Destiny Knot, no random IVs. 3 IVs are inherited directly (up to 2 forceable with a brace) and the other 3 are averaged. See the "How breeding works" guide for full detail.
breeding.natureRandom: Random (neither or both parents hold Everstone)
breeding.extraSlotsNote: The game randomly decides which non-braced stats fall in each bucket — {{inherit}} will be inherited directly from one parent{{best}}, the rest are averaged.
breeding.plannerSubtitle: Step-by-step breeding tree to reach a Pokémon with several IVs at 31 at once, combining base 1x31 parents via the forum guide's (Gilan) "binary doubling" method. Pick how many and which stats you want at 31.
breeding.plannerNature: I also want the correct nature
breeding.plannerMinStats: Select at least 2 stats to generate the breeding tree.
breeding.plannerBaseByStat: How many 1x31 of each stat you need

teams.title: Team builder
teams.subtitle: Build a team of up to 6 Pokémon and spot which attacking types threaten several members at once — pure type coverage, no AI or tier list.
teams.searchPlaceholder: Add a Pokémon to the team
teams.offenseRealMovesCaveat: Members tagged "Real moves" (added from My box) only count the moves you actually chose on their build, not their whole movepool.
teams.teamEmpty: Add Pokémon using the search above.
teams.teamFull: Team full (6/6). Remove one to add another.
teams.weaknessesEmpty: No attacking type threatens 2 or more members at once.
teams.weaknessesNeedTwo: Add at least 2 Pokémon to analyze weaknesses.
teams.suggestionsSubtitle: Resist or are immune to the shared weaknesses above.
teams.offenseSubtitle: Types no member can hit hard (x2+) with any move in their available movepool — doesn't depend on which moves you actually taught them in-game, just what they could learn.
teams.offenseEmpty: Your team can hit all 17 types hard.
teams.offenseNeedOne: Add at least 1 Pokémon to analyze offensive coverage.
teams.movesEmpty: No available moves recorded for this Pokémon.
teams.exportSubtitle: Generates the team as Pokémon Showdown plain text, ready to paste into its team importer.
teams.exportEmpty: Add at least 1 Pokémon to the team to export.
teams.formatCaveat: Each candidate's tier comes from the PokeMMO Wiki tables (updated 2026-04-29).

pokedex.title: Pokédex
pokedex.abilitiesUnverified: Flagged as incomplete on the PokeMMO Wiki — no reliable data yet.
pokedex.noMoveData: No data for this move yet.
pokedex.noAbilityData: No data for this ability yet.
pokedex.movesUnverified: Flagged as incomplete on the PokeMMO Wiki — no reliable data yet.
pokedex.noEvolutionFamily: Doesn't evolve from or into anything
pokedex.locationsEmpty: Not obtainable out in the world (evolution, fossil, boss, event...).
pokedex.typesSubtitle: Pick an attacking type and see its effectiveness against the rest.
pokedex.tierSourceNotice: {{tier}} — per the PokeMMO Wiki as of {{date}}.
pokedex.roleUnverifiedNotice: Classification computed purely from base stats (attack/defense/speed) — NOT a verified PokeMMO competitive role, and doesn't account for moves, items, or honestly anything else. Use it only as a quick pointer.
pokedex.typesComboSubtitle: Pick 1 or 2 defending types (like a Pokémon's typing) and see how effective each attacking type is against that combo.
pokedex.typesComboEmpty: Pick at least one defending type.
pokedex.caughtAccessibilityOff: Not caught. Tap to mark as caught.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.empty: You don't have any tournaments yet.
tournaments.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This can't be undone.

newTournament.title: New tournament
newTournament.duplicateNameError: Two participants have the same name: "{{name}}"
newTournament.formatDoubleHint: Winners + losers brackets with a single grand final. Between 4 and 32 participants; if it's not a power of two, the gaps are filled with automatic byes.
newTournament.formatLeagueHint: Round-robin, single round. With an odd participant count, each player rests one matchday.
newTournament.doubleElimSizeError: Double elimination needs between 4 and 32 participants.

bracket.tapToSetWinner: Tap a player to mark them as the winner
bracket.shareImageUnavailable: Sharing isn't available on this device

exportImport.exportSubtitle: Generate a code and share it with your group so they can see the updated bracket. Re-export after each round.
exportImport.importSubtitle: Paste the code the organizer shared with you.
exportImport.invalidCode: This code is invalid or incomplete

backup.title: Backup
backup.subtitle: Save all your data (tournaments, caught Pokémon, shiny hunts, bookmarks, EV sessions and your Box) into a single text code, no account or internet needed — or restore it on another device.
backup.exportSectionSubtitle: Generate a code with all your current data.
backup.importSectionSubtitle: Paste a code generated before (on this device or another one).
backup.importWarning: Restoring REPLACES all the data currently on this device (tournaments, caught Pokémon, shiny hunts, bookmarks, EV sessions and your Box) with the ones from the code. This can't be undone.
backup.importConfirmMessage: This will replace all your current data (tournaments, caught Pokémon, shiny hunts, bookmarks, EV sessions and your Box) with the ones from the code. This can't be undone. Continue?
backup.importErrorInvalidCode: This code is invalid or incomplete.
backup.importErrorInvalidShape: This code doesn't have the structure of a valid backup.
backup.importErrorUnsupportedVersion: This backup was generated with an unsupported app version.
backup.importErrorUnknownKey: This code contains data this version of the app doesn't recognize.
backup.importErrorInvalidStore: One of the data blocks in the code is corrupt.
backup.importErrorCorruptTournament: One of the tournaments in the code has corrupt data (broken participant references).

guide.title: Guide
guide.subtitle: Items, TMs and tips by region, built from the PokeMMO community's guides
guide.noItems: No items recorded in this guide
guide.bookmarkAdd: Mark as "this is where I left off"

entreno.title: EV training
entreno.subtitle: Track EVs for a live PokeMMO training session, with the game's real training spots.
entreno.nameRequiredError: Give the session a name first.
entreno.empty: You don't have any training sessions yet. Add one above.
entreno.totalEvsOverLimit: Over the 510 total EV limit — PokeMMO warns about this too, but doesn't block it.
entreno.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the session "{{name}}"? Its progress will be lost.
entreno.capNotice: The counter caps at 252 per stat — PokeMMO doesn't give more EVs for a stat even if you keep training it.
entreno.zoneEmptyForStat: No spots recorded for this stat.

box.title: My box
box.subtitle: Save complete builds for your real Pokémon — nature, ability, item, moves and IVs/EVs — and reuse them in the damage calculator and the team builder.
box.empty: You haven't saved any builds yet. Tap "New build" to create the first one.
box.newSubtitle: Search for the Pokémon you want to save a build for.
box.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this build? This can't be undone.
box.pickerTitle: Pick a build from My box
box.pickerEmpty: You don't have any builds saved in My box yet.
box.evsOverLimit: You're over the {{limit}} total EV limit — PokeMMO warns about this too, but doesn't block it.
